sections.paragraph:
(from the root יָגַע) m.-

(1) labour, toil, especially that which is wearisome, and thus grief ( Job 39:11). Gen 31:42, יְגִיעַ כַּפַּי “the labour of my hands.”

(2) product of labour, hence work done, Job 10:3 more often riches, wealth. Isa 45:14 55:2 Jer 3:24 20:5 Eze 23:29 Psa 109:11 Neh 5:13 especially that which arises from agriculture, Psa 78:46 128:2 . יְגִיעַ כַּפַּיִם Hag 1:11, id.
